title: harden korczewski deploy — fix 8 namespace/secret/registry issues
description:
## Summary

- **#1** `env:validate`: added `required` guard for `sealed: true` setup_vars so `WG_MESH_*_PRIVATE_KEY` on korczewski (required: false) no longer causes a hard failure
- **#2 / #9** `workspace:deploy` pre-deploy: replaced hardcoded `kubectl apply -f k3d/namespace.yaml` + `k3d/shared-db.yaml` with namespace-aware alternatives; expanded pre-create loop to cover `coturn` + `workspace-office` so all SealedSecrets land cleanly on a fresh cluster
- **#6** Added `$DOCS_IMAGE` to prod `ENVSUBST_VARS` so `docs.yaml` renders without `InvalidImageName`
- **#7** `prod-korczewski/ddns-updater.yaml`: renamed `secretKeyRef.name` from `ddns-ipv64-key` → `ipv64-api-key` to match what `cert:secret` creates
- **#8** `workspace:deploy`: auto-provisions `ghcr-pull-secret` in `$WORKSPACE_NAMESPACE` from the freshly-decrypted `workspace-secrets` before the kustomize overlay is applied
- **#10** `prod/reflector.yaml`: `tls-sync` CronJob now uses `${WORKSPACE_NAMESPACE}` and `${TLS_SECRET_NAME}` (envsubst vars) as source; merged the two destination loops into one covering `argocd coturn workspace-office ${WEBSITE_NAMESPACE}` with graceful skip on absent namespaces; added `$WEBSITE_NAMESPACE` to prod `ENVSUBST_VARS`
- **#11** `cert:secret`: pre-creates `$WORKSPACE_NAMESPACE` before writing `ipv64-api-key`, so it succeeds even before `workspace:deploy` has run
- **#12** `k3d/network-policies.yaml`: added `10.13.14.0/24` to `allow-signaling-coturn-egress` for korczewski WireGuard mesh (Janus hostNetwork after DNAT)
- **#13** `workspace:transcriber-build` now builds with ghcr.io tag + k3d import for dev; new `workspace:transcriber-push` task for prod
- Refreshed `environments/certs/korczewski.pem` + `environments/sealed-secrets/korczewski.yaml` after cluster reset
- CLAUDE.md: documented mandatory bring-up order after cluster reset + SealedSecrets keypair rotation

## Test plan

- [x] `task test:all` — 80 tests, 0 failures
- [x] `task workspace:validate` — kustomize output valid
- [ ] Live smoke: `task workspace:deploy ENV=korczewski` on next korczewski deploy cycle
